'''kaboho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldsightedness|oldsightedness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldsightedness|oldsightedness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kaboho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæbeheth|kæbeheth]] || [[word:kæbehej|kæbehej]] || [[word:kæbehesh|kæbehesh]] || [[word:kæbehe|kæbehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kabobohoth|kabobohoth]] || [[word:kabobohoj|kabobohoj]] || [[word:kabobohosh|kabobohosh]] || [[word:kaboboho|kaboboho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kabohoth|kabohoth]] || [[word:kabohoj|kabohoj]] || [[word:kabohosh|kabohosh]] || [[word:kaboho|kaboho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kabofhofth|kabofhofth]] || [[word:kabofhofj|kabofhofj]] || [[word:kabofhofsh|kabofhofsh]] || [[word:kabofhof|kabofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kabohotho|kabohotho]] || [[word:kabohojo|kabohojo]] || [[word:kabohosho|kabohosho]] || [[word:kabohoko|kabohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kabohoth|kabohoth]] || [[word:kabohoj|kabohoj]] || [[word:kabohosh|kabohosh]] || [[word:kaboho|kaboho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kabohothol|kabohothol]] || [[word:kabohojol|kabohojol]] || [[word:kabohoshol|kabohoshol]] || [[word:kabohokol|kabohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kabohoothotho|kabohoothotho]] || [[word:kabohoojojo|kabohoojojo]] || [[word:kabohooshosho|kabohooshosho]] || [[word:kabohooko|kabohooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kabohothon|kabohothon]] || [[word:kabohojon|kabohojon]] || [[word:kabohoshon|kabohoshon]] || [[word:kabohokon|kabohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kabohothooro|kabohothooro]] || [[word:kabohojooro|kabohojooro]] || [[word:kabohoshooro|kabohoshooro]] || [[word:kabohokooro|kabohokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
